promptStandard.philosophie: Design-first, Figma-quality dashboard generation to lock the visual direction before code implementation.

instructions_systeme.contexte: Generate a premium dashboard UI concept for Solena before implementation.
instructions_systeme.methode_pedagogique: Image-first product design with strict layout hierarchy and readable dashboard sections.

contraintes_absolues: GENERER UNE IMAGE DE DASHBOARD, PAS UNE ILLUSTRATION ABSTRAITE.
AFFICHER import, status, pipeline, result and governance blocks.
NOISE LIMITEE : keep the composition implementation-friendly.

sections.contenu_md: string (Markdown with sections: Purpose, Layout, Visual hierarchy, Color palette, Content blocks, States, CTA, Constraints, Handoff)
